text:
Sakura is one of the three Colossus Titan cosplayers in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Sakura has dark skin, brown eyes and black hair she braided. During the convention, she wears a leotard representing the Colossus Titan upper body and a matching mask.

Story

Sakura is in an elevator with her friends Lisa and Priyanka getting ready for the convention. She expresses excitement at the event and motivates Priyanka who feels nervous. She then puts her mask on and lets people photograph her.

They come across a group of four men dressed up as Survey Corps members. One of them having groped Lisa, she witnesses the latter beating up three of them and states that she is the best at cosplaying.
